uploadDescription: Choose the PDF whose owner password restrictions should be removed.
dragDropOrClick: Drag and drop a PDF here, or click to upload
localOnlyNote: Processing runs locally in this browser. The file is not uploaded.
actionDescription: Runs qpdf in a browser worker and writes a new PDF with permission restrictions removed.
openPasswordNote: This does not recover or bypass a user/open password required to view the PDF.
resultDescription: Download the unrestricted PDF after processing completes.
noFileDescription: Upload a PDF to remove owner password restrictions.
readyDescription: Review the selected file, then start removal when you are ready.
processingDescription: Removing permission restrictions in a worker.
successDescription: Owner password restrictions were removed. Download the new PDF.
unsupportedFile: Unsupported file type. Please choose a PDF file.
workerUnsupportedError: This browser cannot start the PDF processing worker.
qpdfFailedError: The PDF could not be unlocked. It may require an open password, be damaged, or use unsupported encryption.
genericError: PDF processing failed. Try another file.
